points.text: Sidewinder Therapeutics secured $137M Series B financing led by OrbiMed and Novartis Venture Fund to advance bispecific antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) into clinical testing.
Genmab is advancing a late-stage clinical pipeline including wholly owned bispecific antibody programs alongside antibody-drug conjugates and immune-modulating antibodies.

Regeneron and Telix announced a strategic collaboration to co-develop and co-commercialize next-generation radiopharmaceutical therapies leveraging Regeneron's bispecific antibody discovery platforms.
Global bispecific antibody market projected to reach $22.3 billion by 2030 driven by immuno-oncology innovation and R&D investment acceleration.

Genentech received FDA label update for Vabysmo (faricimab-svoa), a bispecific antibody targeting angiopoietin-1 and VEGF-A, extending treatment duration for macular edema due to retinal vein occlusion beyond 6 months.

Samsung Biologics highlighted structural innovations and enhanced manufacturability solutions for bispecific antibodies (bsAbs) to address complex purification challenges and ensure clinical viability.
Boehringer Ingelheim is evaluating a combination regimen involving a DLL3-targeting T-cell engager and a PD-L1/VEGF-A bispecific antibody for small cell lung cancer.

MacroGenics — Lorigerlimab — Platinum-resistant ovarian and clear cell gynecologic cancer — FDA lifted partial clinical hold on Phase 2 LINNET study (NCT06730347) following safety review; trial resumes enrollment with revised protocol.

ABL Bio / Compass Therapeutics — Tovecimig (CTX-009) — Biliary Tract Cancer — FDA granted orphan drug designation for the DLL4/VEGF-A bispecific antibody following phase 2/3 COMPANION-002 trial results.

MajesTEC-3 Phase 3 study evaluated a BCMA-directed bispecific antibody in combination with daratumumab and dexamethasone for relapsed multiple myeloma, demonstrating improved progression-free survival.
Bispecific antibodies targeting BCMA have emerged as critical therapeutic options for relapsed multiple myeloma, showing meaningful response rates in heavily pretreated populations.
Sidewinder Therapeutics — Bispecific ADCs — Oncology — $137M Series B funding secured April 8, 2026; platform designed to recognize dual targets to broaden ADC reach beyond current limitations.

Genmab — Rinatabart Sesutecan (Rina-S) — Advanced Ovarian Cancer — Presented safety and tolerability data in combination with bevacizumab; Rinatabart is a bispecific antibody-drug conjugate targeting CD3 and CD38.

Regeneron — Bispecific antibody discovery platform — Oncology radiopharmaceuticals — Partnered with Telix to develop solid tumor therapies; $40M upfront payment secured with up to $2.1B in potential milestones.
BCC Research — Global Bispecific Antibodies Market — Immuno-oncology — Market valuation forecasted at $22.3 billion by 2030; growth driven by R&D investment and innovation in bispecific platforms.

Genentech — Vabysmo (faricimab-svoa) — Macular edema due to retinal vein occlusion — FDA label update approved April 10, 2026, allowing treatment continuation beyond 6 months; bispecific antibody inhibits angiopoietin-1 and VEGF-A.
Boehringer Ingelheim — DLL3-targeting T-cell engager + PD-L1/VEGF-A bispecific antibody — Small Cell Lung Cancer — Combination therapy evaluation initiated to target dual pathways in SCLC.

MacroGenics — Lorigerlimab — Platinum-resistant ovarian and clear cell gynecologic cancer — FDA lifted partial clinical hold on Phase 2 LINNET study; hold was initiated in February 2026 due to grade 4 neutropenia, grade 4 myocarditis, and one grade 5 fatal event.

ABL Bio / Compass Therapeutics — Tovecimig (CTX-009) — Biliary Tract Cancer — FDA granted orphan drug designation; phase 2/3 COMPANION-002 trial showed 17.1% ORR vs 5.3% with paclitaxel monotherapy (p=0.031).

MajesTEC-3 — BCMA-directed bispecific antibody + daratumumab/dexamethasone — Relapsed Multiple Myeloma — Phase 3 trial demonstrated improved progression-free survival and deep, durable responses in patients with prior anti-CD38 and lenalidomide exposure.

Sidewinder Therapeutics — Precision bispecific ADC development — Bispecific ADC platform — $137M Series B raised; investors include OrbiMed and Novartis Venture Fund; targeting expanded tumor antigen recognition.

Genmab — Bispecific antibody development and commercialization — Rinatabart Sesutecan (Rina-S) and broader pipeline — Advancing eight approved antibody medicines and multiple late-stage bispecific programs.

Regeneron — Expansion into radiopharmaceuticals via bispecific antibody technology — VelocImmune-derived solid tumor targets — 50/50 cost/profit-sharing model with Telix; initial focus on lung cancer and radio-diagnostics.
Telix — Commercialization of next-gen radiopharmaceuticals — Regeneron bispecific antibody portfolio — $40M upfront received; option to co-fund commercialization or earn royalties.
BCC Research — Market intelligence on bispecific antibodies — Global bispecific antibody market — Forecasting $22.3 billion valuation by 2030; focus on immuno-oncology sector expansion.

Samsung Biologics — Bispecific antibody manufacturing optimization — S-DUAL™ platform — Addressing structural complexity and purification challenges for bsAbs to ensure product purity and clinical viability.
Boehringer Ingelheim — Advancing bispecific antibody combinations — PD-L1/VEGF-A bispecific antibody + DLL3 T-cell engager — Early-stage evaluation for Small Cell Lung Cancer.
MacroGenics — Bispecific DART molecule development — Lorigerlimab (PD-1/CTLA-4 bispecific) — Phase 2 LINNET study resumed enrollment after FDA hold lift; mid-year clinical update expected.

ABL Bio / Compass Therapeutics — Commercialization of bispecific antibody pipeline — Tovecimig (CTX-009) — Secured FDA orphan drug and fast track designations for biliary tract cancer indication; phase 2/3 data supports regulatory filing strategy.

Sidewinder Bispecific ADCs — Mechanism: Dual-target recognition via bispecific antibody scaffold linked to cytotoxic payload — Phase: Preclinical/Early Clinical — Population: Solid tumors with limited ADC accessibility — Comparator: Conventional monospecific ADCs — Goal: Overcome antigen heterogeneity and improve tumor cell killing precision.

Rinatabart Sesutecan — Mechanism: Bispecific antibody targeting CD3 and tumor-associated antigen — Phase: Clinical development — Population: Advanced ovarian cancer patients — Comparator: Combination with bevacizumab — Status: Safety and tolerability data presented.

Regeneron bispecific antibodies — Mechanism: VelocImmune mouse-derived solid tumor targeting — Phase: Preclinical/Early development (collaboration launch) — Population: Solid tumor patients — Strategy: Combination with radio-diagnostics for patient selection.

Vabysmo (faricimab-svoa) — Mechanism: Bispecific antibody inhibiting angiopoietin-1 and VEGF-A — Phase: Approved (Label Update) — Population: Patients with macular edema due to retinal vein occlusion — Comparator: N/A — Outcome: Extended treatment duration beyond 6 months approved by FDA.

PD-L1/VEGF-A bispecific antibody — Mechanism: Dual blockade of PD-L1 immune checkpoint and VEGF-A angiogenesis pathway — Phase: Preclinical/Early Clinical (Combination study) — Population: Small Cell Lung Cancer — Context: Being evaluated in combination with DLL3-targeting T-cell engager.

Lorigerlimab — Mechanism: Bispecific DART molecule targeting PD-1 and CTLA-4 simultaneously — Phase: 2 (LINNET) — Population: Platinum-resistant ovarian and clear cell gynecologic cancer — Comparator: Not specified — Endpoints: Primary endpoint is objective response rate (ORR); 41 participants dosed across 2 cohorts prior to hold.

Tovecimig (CTX-009) — Mechanism: DLL4 and VEGF-A bispecific antibody inhibiting tumor angiogenesis — Phase: 2/3 (COMPANION-002) — Population: Unresectable advanced/metastatic biliary tract cancer — Comparator: Paclitaxel monotherapy — Results: 17.1% ORR vs 5.3% (p=0.031); 16.2% partial response rate vs 5.3% in control.

BCMA-directed bispecific antibody — Mechanism: Dual targeting of BCMA and CD3 — Phase: 3 (MajesTEC-3) — Population: Relapsed multiple myeloma with prior anti-CD38/lenalidomide exposure — Comparator: Standard-of-care regimens — Endpoints: Improved progression-free survival and depth of response.

Sidewinder Therapeutics — $137M Series B financing round closed April 8, 2026 — Investors: OrbiMed, Novartis Venture Fund, and others — Allocation: Advancement of bispecific ADC pipeline into clinical trials.

Regeneron / Telix — Strategic radiopharma collaboration — Bispecific antibody-based radiopharmaceuticals — $40M upfront; up to $2.1B in development/commercial milestones plus low double-digit royalties.
